brandcolor-white.usage: Raised surfaces, assistant bubbles, inputs, text on primary buttons.

brandcolor-primary.usage: Primary CTA, links, active nav, sliders, error emphasis (text).
examples: bg-brandcolor-primary text-brandcolor-white hover:bg-brandcolor-primary-hover rounded-full px-5 py-2

brandcolor-text-strong.usage: Primary text, headings, scrim overlays with opacity.

brandcolor-stroke-strong.usage: Strong borders and default icon color on fill chrome.

brandcolor-strokeweak.usage: Default borders and input hover border.

primary.completeClasses: rounded-full bg-brandcolor-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-brandcolor-white hover:bg-brandcolor-primary-hover disabled:opacity-50
primary.whenToUse: Main submit actions (Send when enabled, Save check-in, Try again).

outlineOnFill.completeClasses: rounded-full border border-brandcolor-strokeweak px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-brandcolor-text-strong hover:bg-brandcolor-white

card.whenToUse: History rows, report filters, meal cards.

input.classes: rounded-xl border border-brandcolor-strokeweak bg-brandcolor-fill px-3 py-2 text-sm text-brandcolor-text-strong

dayDateBadge.styling: inline-flex rounded-full border border-brandcolor-strokeweak bg-brandcolor-fill px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-brandcolor-text-strong; shows weekday (long) · Today · YYYY-MM-DD using weekdayLongForLocalDateKey in src/lib/date.ts
dayDateBadge.whenToUse: Above the onboarding greeting on a new day, and sticky at top of the chat transcript after the first meal log.

mealComposer.wrapper: Single rounded-2xl row: white field + inline circular primary control with PaperPlaneRight (arrow send) or CircleNotch while pending; border-transparent → hover:border-brandcolor-strokeweak → focus-within:border-brandcolor-stroke-strong
mealComposer.sendWhenEmpty: disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none on send when message is whitespace-only
mealComposer.floatingDock: When CHAT logging is allowed, no reaction panel, and EOD summary strip is off: composer is shrink-0 at bottom of chat flex column (justify-center, max-w-md / max-w-3xl), elevated pill — not viewport-fixed. If EOD strip is on, composer inline after that block.

mealQuickPicks.styling: Two centered rows (3 tiles, then 2), max-w-md, justify-center; image+label; bg-brandcolor-white border-brandcolor-strokeweak; hover:bg-brandcolor-fill; Image mix-blend-multiply

historyDayView.scroll: Main pane: outer main flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-hidden; full-width overflow-y-auto middle layer; inner mx-auto max-w-3xl — scrollbar at right edge of main column, not mid-viewport.
historyDayView.loggedAt: formatLogTimestamp(loggedAt, user.timezone) — e.g. Mon, Apr 27, 7:07 AM (not ISO strings).
historyDayView.reactionNotes: rounded-xl bg-brandcolor-fill px-3 py-2 text-sm text-brandcolor-text-strong; no border.

aiDailySummaryBubble.metadata: ChatMessage.metadata.type === daily_ai_summary with greeting + articleText + builtWithAi + optional aiProvider (studio|vertex|mock).
aiDailySummaryBubble.styling: Phosphor Article + label Summary + optional Built with AI; rounded-xl bg-brandcolor-fill px-4 py-3; greeting font-medium; body whitespace-pre-wrap.
aiDailySummaryBubble.backends: Server-only: AI_PROVIDER=auto uses Vertex (project + WIF/credentials); GEMINI_API_KEY used only when AI_PROVIDER=studio. Never expose keys to client.

sidebarDesktop.collapsedTop: Phosphor Sidebar opens rail; hover:bg-brandcolor-fill on control.
sidebarDesktop.expandedTop: Expanded row: justify-between — logo link left, collapse h-8 w-8 right (Sidebar 20px). Collapsed: h-8 w-8 expand. Mobile header: logo left end, menu + sign-out right. Chat avatar: bg-brandcolor-fill.
sidebarDesktop.newChatRow: Desktop sidebar: Plus + label 'New chat' above Chats; opens NewDayChatDialog. Mobile: same dialog from drawer first row 'New chat for today' (dialog mounted at AppShell root, not inside hidden aside).
sidebarDesktop.navLabels: First item label 'Chats' (today); History unchanged for past days.
sidebarDesktop.newDayDialog: Continue closes; Start fresh submits resetActiveDaySessionForToday (ACTIVE + CHAT only).

workflow: STEP 1: Read src/app/globals.css for the eight brandcolor tokens only.
STEP 2: Read themeguide.json themeColors and componentGuidelines.
STEP 3: Implement UI using only bg-brandcolor-*, text-brandcolor-*, border-brandcolor-*, font-serif, font-sans.
STEP 4: Verify no hex in JSX class strings, no gray/zinc/teal palette utilities.

noHexInComponents.rule: Do not paste hex colors into JSX class strings; use theme tokens.

noCoolDefaultPalette.rule: Do not use bg-gray-*, text-zinc-*, bg-teal-*, etc.

noTailwindConfigJs.rule: Theme extension is only in globals.css for this repo.
